variants: Goran Markovic was born in Mapleroot Edge and has developed a strong commitment to civic engagement throughout his life. One of his key roles is serving on the board of Disaster Aid at Whimwood Network, where he helps coordinate disaster relief efforts. Goran currently works at Lumen Pathways Institute, where he employs his skills in Russian Cyrillic, contributing to various projects that bridge communication gaps in diverse communities.
